name: multi-agent-app-1
description: Local consumer / manual-test app for AgentInspect

scripts.agent:all: npm run check:import && npm run agent:basic && npm run agent:nested && npm run agent:parallel && npm run agent:error && npm run agent:observe && npm run agent:silent
scripts.logs:inspect: npx agent-inspect logs logs/proactive-json.log --format json --config logs/agent-inspect.logs.json
scripts.logs:tail:once: npx agent-inspect tail --file logs/proactive-json.log --format json --config logs/agent-inspect.logs.json --once
scripts.logs:inspect:json: npx agent-inspect logs logs/proactive-json.log --format json --config logs/agent-inspect.logs.json --json
scripts.manual:test: npm run agent:all && npm run inspect:list && npm run inspect:list:json && npm run inspect:list:error && npm run inspect:list:success && npm run inspect:clean:dry
